hero.subtitle: International models, high-reach influencers and elite hostesses. We connect the best talents with the most demanding brands.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: A full-service agency for all your digital communication and event needs.
services.s1_desc: Editorial shoots, advertising campaigns and runway shows. Our top models elevate your collections with elegance.
services.s2_desc: Creative collaborations with our high-reach influencers on Instagram, TikTok and YouTube.
services.s3_desc: Hostesses for trade shows, conferences, galas and high-end corporate events.
services.s4_desc: Premium photo and video production for your social media, digital campaigns and brand content.

how.title: How does it work?
how.subtitle: From application to your first missions in 3 steps.
how.s1_desc: Fill out our form, submit your photos and complete your video casting in just a few minutes.
how.s2_desc: Our team evaluates your profile within 48h and provides personalised coaching to help you grow.
how.s3_desc: Access exclusive offers from our partners — international brands, agencies and media.

talents.title: Our Talents
talents.subtitle: Discover a curated selection of our best talents available for your projects.

testimonials.title: What our clients say
testimonials.t1_quote: Mayaredia provided us with exceptional talents for our spring campaign. Absolute professionalism and responsiveness.
testimonials.t2_quote: Authentic and highly engaged influencers. Our ROI tripled thanks to their network. I recommend without hesitation.
testimonials.t3_quote: The ideal agency for high-end events. Our hostesses delighted every single one of our guests.

cta.subtitle: Hundreds of talents already trust us. Apply today and land your first missions with the world's biggest brands.

services_page.hero_subtitle: From fashion photography to digital influence, high-end events and content production — Mayaredia is with you every step of the way.
services_page.cta_subtitle: Contact us today. Our team will review your brief within 24h and suggest the best-matched talents for your needs.
services_page.s1_subtitle: Exceptional talents to showcase your collections
services_page.s1_desc: Our pool of international top models covers the full creative spectrum: from refined editorial shoots to major advertising campaigns, runway shows and seasonal lookbooks. Every talent is rigorously selected on measurements, portfolio and ability to embody your brand universe.
services_page.s1_f1_desc: Collaboration with leading fashion photographers to deliver striking visuals.
services_page.s1_f2_desc: TV, large-format outdoor, digital — our models adapt to any medium.
services_page.s1_f3_desc: Selection of experienced models for your Parisian and international shows.
services_page.s1_f4_desc: Photo series for your ready-to-wear, jewellery or accessories collections.
services_page.s2_subtitle: Amplify your brand to the right audiences
services_page.s2_desc: Our influencers collectively count over 2 million followers on Instagram, TikTok and YouTube. Each collaboration is strategically designed: co-built creative brief, mastered editorial calendar, real-time ROI reporting. From authentic product placement to long-term exclusive partnerships, we orchestrate high-impact influencer campaigns.
services_page.s2_f1_desc: Sponsored posts, stories, reels and lives — immediate visibility with engaged audiences.
services_page.s2_f2_desc: Viral content created natively to maximise organic reach on TikTok.
services_page.s2_f3_desc: Brand integrations, unboxings and in-depth tutorials for high-value content.
services_page.s2_f4_desc: Dedicated dashboard tracking impressions, engagement, reach and conversions in real time.
services_page.s3_subtitle: An elite presence for your most prestigious events
services_page.s3_desc: From charity gala receptions to B2B stand management at motor shows, our hostesses bring class, professionalism and multilingualism. Selected on presentation, interpersonal skills and general culture, they become ideal ambassadors of your image, in France and internationally.
services_page.s3_f1_desc: VIP welcome, cloakroom coordination, table service for the most exclusive events.
services_page.s3_f2_desc: Bilingual and trilingual hostesses to manage your stands and welcome prospects.
services_page.s3_f3_desc: Badge logistics, orientation, speaker support and crowd management.
services_page.s3_f4_desc: Product-trained hostesses for impactful demonstrations and polished talking points.
services_page.s4_subtitle: Premium content that captures attention and converts
services_page.s4_desc: Our production studio brings together photographers, videographers and art directors to create exceptional visual content. We manage the entire creative process: concept, casting, filming, post-production and delivery.
services_page.s4_f1_desc: Packshots, fashion, beauty and lifestyle photos for all your communication materials.
services_page.s4_f2_desc: Commercials, brand films, interviews and corporate documentaries in cinema quality.
services_page.s4_f3_desc: Algorithm-optimised editing — TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts.
services_page.s4_f4_desc: Moodboard design, visual identity and overall coherence of your brand image.

offres_page.hero_subtitle: Models, hostesses, influencers — browse our active offers and apply directly. New missions added every week.
offres_page.footer_subtitle: Submit your application anyway. Our team will contact you as soon as a matching offer becomes available.
offres_page.man_vet_desc: Take part in ready-to-wear shoots, print campaigns, seasonal lookbooks and e-commerce. We are looking for female and male profiles of all body types, for national and international brands.
offres_page.man_ling_desc: Lingerie shoots for high-end catalogues, e-commerce and advertising campaigns. Sessions take place in a studio with an all-female team. Professional and supportive environment.
offres_page.man_web_desc: Worn product shots for e-commerce pages: dynamic packshots on white or coloured studio backgrounds, lifestyle settings. Fast-paced sessions with multiple outfits. Regular, renewable assignments.
offres_page.man_soc_desc: Native visual content creation for our partner brands social media: reels, stories, lifestyle posts. Outdoor or studio filming based on the brief. Ideal for natural, camera-confident profiles.
offres_page.man_soc_req1: Comfortable on camera and in front of a lens
offres_page.hot_sal_desc: Stand management at national and international trade shows. Welcoming visitors, presenting products and qualifying leads. Official outfit provided by the client.
offres_page.hot_gal_desc: Ultra-premium assignments at prestigious galas, charity evenings, award ceremonies and private dinners. VIP welcome, cloakroom coordination and table service. Evening gown provided.
offres_page.hot_corp_desc: Logistics management for corporate events: registration, badge distribution, participant guidance and speaker support. Recurring assignments with major clients.
offres_page.inf_plac_desc: Naturally integrate a product or service into your content: Instagram post, TikTok video, story. Creative brief provided by the brand, editorial freedom preserved.
offres_page.inf_amb_desc: Become the face of a brand for 3 to 12 months: planned monthly content, event presence, dedicated promo code and participation in product launches.
offres_page.inf_amb_req2: Image consistent with the partner brand
offres_page.inf_ugc_desc: Create videos and photos for brand accounts and ads — no posting on your own account required. 100% native mobile content, subtitled, delivered in multiple formats. No follower threshold.
offres_page.inf_live_desc: Host commercial lives on Instagram, TikTok Shop or YouTube: product presentations, community interaction, real-time selling. Fast-growing format — onboarding training provided.
offres_page.inf_live_req1: Very comfortable going live and improvising

casting_page.title: Join Mayaredia
casting_page.subtitle: Are you a model, influencer or hostess? Submit your application and join our network of digital talents.
casting_page.video_subtitle: Answer our questions on camera to give yourself every chance of success.

form.success_subtitle: Thank you for your application. Our team will contact you within 48h.
form.upload_cta: Click to upload your photos / videos
form.upload_hint: JPG, PNG, WEBP, MP4 — max 5 files, 50 MB

video.title: Video Casting
video.intro: You will answer {count} questions on camera. The video will be recorded continuously and sent automatically to our team.
video.camera_notice: Allow camera and microphone access when prompted by your browser.
video.uploading_subtitle: Please do not close this page.
video.done_subtitle: Our team will review your casting within 48h.
video.camera_error: Cannot access camera. Please allow access in your browser settings.
video.network_error: Network error. Please check your connection.
video.q1: Introduce yourself: first name, age and city.
video.q2: Why do you want to join the Mayaredia agency?
video.q3: What is your experience in modelling or influence?
video.q4: Describe your style and what makes you unique.
video.q5: What are your professional goals for the next 12 months?
